description: VL53L0X Time-of-Flight Distance Sensor — Standard Test Vectors for Renode I2C Emulation

harness._comment: Call probe before read so the Model-ID register (0xC0) is exercised.

0x14.name: result_data
0x14.description: Result data block (12 bytes from 0x14..0x1F). Bytes [4:5] = 0x01F4 = 500 (range in mm). Other fields: signal rate, ambient, etc.

steps.description: Call vl53l0x_init(). Reads model ID (0xEE). Expect return 0.
Call vl53l0x_read_range(&distance_mm). Triggers measurement, polls interrupt status, reads result data. Expect return 0.
Verify distance_mm in expected range (500 mm from test vectors).

default.raw_value_description: Distance in mm read from result register block 0x14..0x1F, bytes[10:11] = 16-bit range.

required_writes.description: Model-ID read (0xC0) to identify sensor as VL53L0X (expected 0xEE). A driver that never reads the ID cannot verify the chip is present.
SYSRANGE_START (0x00) write to trigger a measurement. Common values are 0x01 (start single-shot) or 0x02 (back-to-back continuous). Without any write to 0x00, the sensor never measures.
Range-result read: register pointer 0x14 for the 12-byte result block, or 0x1E/0x1F for the 16-bit range directly.

runtime_tests.name: zero_mm_contact
runtime_tests.note: Distance = 0 mm (direct contact). Lower edge of measurement range.

runtime_tests.name: mid_1000mm
runtime_tests.note: Distance = 1000 mm = 1 m. Typical room-scale measurement.

runtime_tests.name: max_range_2000mm
runtime_tests.note: Distance = 2000 mm. Near VL53L0X default max range in normal precision mode.

runtime_tests.name: long_range_4000mm
runtime_tests.note: Distance = 4000 mm. Approaches long-range mode limit.

runtime_tests.name: invalid_reading_out_of_range
runtime_tests.note: Distance = 8190 mm / 0x1FFE. Beyond reliable range; valid interrupt status but huge value.
